citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:30 on May 13,
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by phone. The licensee was able to text and let the
inspector know she was not able to return for the inspection process and future hours of availability were discussed.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:30 on May 13, 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by phone. The licensee was able to text and let the 
inspector know she was not able to return for the inspection process and future hours of availability were discussed.  
 
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
